# Funduq

> Funduq is a holiday homes and short-term rental platform in Dubai, UAE. We list verified apartments, villas and studios with transparent pricing, no hidden fees, and flexible check-in.
> 

## About

Funduq connects travelers with verified property owners in Dubai. All listings include photos, amenities, pricing, and availability calendars. Properties are reviewed by our moderation team before being published.

## Services

- Short-term apartment rentals in Dubai
- Holiday villa bookings in Dubai
- Studio and room rentals for tourists
- Flexible check-in and check-out
- Verified property listings with photos

## Properties

Browse all available properties at https://funduq.ae/en/villas

## Contact

Email: [info@sezavi.ae](mailto:info@sezavi.ae)

Location: Dubai, UAE
